name: Poppy Seed Bread (Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all cake ingredients together using a mixer.
2. Pour the batter into greased loaf pans (9 x 5 x 3 inches).
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Yield: 2 loaves.
4. For the glaze, mix together:
- 1/2 teaspoon Vanilla Extract
- 1/2 teaspoon Butter Flavoring
- 1/2 teaspoon Almond Flavoring
- 1/2 teaspoon Nutmeg
- 1/4 cup Orange Juice
- 3/4 cup Powdered Sugar (sifted)
5. Pour the glaze over the bread when it is done.
6. To bake in jars:
- Grease 5 wide-mouth pint canning jars.
- Divide the dough evenly between the jars, leaving them slightly under half full.
- Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes.
7. Remove the jars from the oven one at a time and pour glaze over hot bread.
8. Immediately apply and firmly tighten a two-piece wide-mouth canning lid to each jar. The lid will form a vacuum seal as it cools.
9. Store the canned bread on the pantry shelf with other canned foods or in the freezer. It remains safe to eat as long as the jars stay vacuum sealed and mold-free.
